# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Write secure code.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: true

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: true

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: true

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: order-upstream
    targets:
      - target: order-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: product-upstream
    targets:
      - target: product-service:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: user-service
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: order-service
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: product-service
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: key-auth
    service: user-service

  - name: key-auth
    service: order-service

  - name: key-auth
    service: product-service

  - name: cors
    service: user-service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"

  - name: cors
    service: order-service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"

  - name: cors
    service: product-service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
